cases.prompt: Review this frontend change before merge. Do not apply fixes.
required_facts: verification gaps or blockers when present
forbidden_boilerplate: repeat or paraphrase the user request
name selected skills or internal workflow
include raw or long command logs
add praise or optional commentary before findings
cases.reason: Review output should prioritize actionable evidence and keep verification gaps visible.

cases.prompt: The settings page crashes after clicking Save. Reproduce it, fix the smallest cause, and rerun the relevant check.
required_facts: blockers or remaining risk when present
forbidden_boilerplate: repeat or paraphrase the user request
name selected skills or internal workflow
include raw or long command logs
list routine attempts that did not affect the result
cases.reason: A bugfix handoff needs root cause, scope, and evidence without process narration.

cases.prompt: Verify the implemented page against screenshots at desktop, tablet, and 375px mobile.
forbidden_boilerplate: repeat or paraphrase the user request
name selected skills or internal workflow
include raw or long command logs
claim rendered QA from source inspection
cases.reason: Visual QA must preserve viewport evidence and blockers while omitting a verbose checklist.

cases.prompt: The dev server failed twice with the same esbuild sandbox access error. Report the visual QA status without restarting it again.
required_facts: approval or next decision when needed
forbidden_boilerplate: repeat or paraphrase the user request
name selected skills or internal workflow
include raw or long command logs
describe repeated attempts after the stop condition
cases.reason: A blocked visual check needs one decisive error and status, not another retry narrative.

cases.prompt: On Windows, npm run lint failed because npm.ps1 is blocked. Verify with the correct fallback and report the result.
required_facts: unresolved lint or shell blocker when present
forbidden_boilerplate: repeat or paraphrase the user request
name selected skills or internal workflow
include raw or long command logs
narrate successful setup steps
cases.reason: Lint output should expose the exact fallback and result in a compact handoff.

cases.prompt: Implement this approved Design Implementation Spec in the current React page using existing CSS Modules.
required_facts: spec deviation or blocker when present
forbidden_boilerplate: repeat or paraphrase the user request
name selected skills or internal workflow
include raw or long command logs
list every convention inspected
cases.reason: Implementation output should prove scope, reuse, and verification without echoing the workflow.

cases.prompt: Implement this approved UI fix in the current React component. Do not write tests unless explicitly requested.
required_facts: remaining risk or blocker when present
forbidden_boilerplate: repeat or paraphrase the user request
name selected skills or internal workflow
include raw or long command logs
report irrelevant skipped test work
cases.reason: A small UI fix should not spend output tokens explaining that unrequested tests were skipped.

cases.prompt: Fix this component where useCallback was added around a simple local handler.
forbidden_boilerplate: repeat or paraphrase the user request
name selected skills or internal workflow
include raw or long command logs
claim a generic performance improvement
cases.reason: The refactor handoff should state the identity decision and evidence directly.

cases.prompt: Update the agent bundle rules and validators for a new skill trigger boundary.
required_facts: unresolved risk or blocker when present
forbidden_boilerplate: repeat or paraphrase the user request
name selected skills or internal workflow
include raw or long command logs
list unchanged bundle areas
cases.reason: Bundle maintenance needs a compact evidence-backed change report rather than process narration.
